message:
feat(store): optimize set operations, add BITFIELD overflow guard, and regression tests

SINTER/SUNION/SDIFF scan smallest set first; fix SUNIONSTORE dirty
flag on empty result; add BITFIELD 512MB overflow check.
Tests: sdiff_type, sinter_opt, sunionstore_dirty; update float/scan.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
